member.name: M:GoveeMAUI.Services.GoveeService.RetryAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String)
member.summary: Ejecuta una operación con reintentos exponenciales.

member.name: M:GoveeMAUI.Services.MonitorService.SetPlugManuallyAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Permite encender o apagar el enchufe manualmente desde la UI, independientemente del umbral de temperatura.

member.name: M:GoveeMAUI.ViewModels.MainViewModel.OnPlugOnChanged(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.
